description: Shared Renovate preset for getnodus repositories.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge non-major updates. Renovate self-merges once checks are green and the stability delay clears (platform auto-merge needs a required check, which not all repos have).

Batch all non-major npm updates into a single PR. Dozens of individual minor/patch PRs all edit the same lockfile during the 3-day stability window and conflict the moment one merges; one grouped PR has one lockfile change and cannot self-conflict.
Bundle all GitHub Actions updates into one PR.
Group the Remotion monorepo packages (they version in lockstep, share one package.json).
Major updates always require manual review.
